rationale: Adds a single new file `.copilot-review/result.md` (47 lines) containing a Renovate dependency-risk assessment for the MariaDB image bump 12.1 → 12.2 (PR #207). Document includes verdict (Yellow Caution / Merge after checks / Medium confidence), an update-inventory table with resolved digests (`12.1.2@sha256:e487701b1f7e3f47319fe005b417c72becb67824a58b7bd35c6505f070f66dcd → 12.2.2@sha256:350261292d0129fd4b24f537dcf05ecd3ebe34d39d5b592af551f38310e7a167`), upstream change items including the CVE-2026-32710 security fix and behavior changes (MDEV-36787 rollback on failed `CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE ... SELECT`, MDEV-36321/36089/36125 optimizer hints, MDEV-20022/20023/32854 SQL/JSON additions), a local-impact section scoping use to Invoice Ninja's single-replica Recreate Deployment with Longhorn PVC, and a pre-merge checklist (backup, smoke test, log review, rollback plan). Pure review documentation; no code or config changes. Closed-without-merge is unsurprising for review-only artifacts.
